requirement_topic.en: BSMD Standards Screening and IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933 Evidence

summary.en: Bahrain's BSMD adopts GCC standards through GSO, including GSO IEC 61427-2:2024 for secondary cells and batteries for renewable energy storage in on-grid applications. For lithium BESS exported to Bahrain, IEC 62619:2022 safety evidence for industrial lithium cells and batteries is the international baseline expected by project owners, insurers, EPCs, and lenders. IEC 62933 series evidence for electrical energy storage system performance and safety may be requested for utility-scale or commercial BESS projects. Public sources do not confirm a single mandatory whole-system BESS import certificate in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 巴林BSMD通过GSO采用GCC标准，包括用于并网储能应用的二次电池GSO IEC 61427-2:2024。对于出口巴林的锂电BESS，IEC 62619:2022工业锂电芯和电池安全证据是项目业主、保险方、EPC和贷款方期望的国际基准。对于公用事业规模或商业BESS项目，可能要求提供电能储能系统性能和安全IEC 62933系列证据。公开资料未确认巴林存在单一强制整机BESS进口证书。
summary.zht: 巴林BSMD通過GSO採用GCC標準，包括用於併網儲能應用的二次電池GSO IEC 61427-2:2024。對於出口巴林的鋰電BESS，IEC 62619:2022工業鋰電芯和電池安全證據是項目業主、保險方、EPC和貸款方期望的國際基準。對於公用事業規模或商業BESS項目，可能要求提供電能儲能系統性能和安全IEC 62933系列證據。公開資料未確認巴林存在單一強制整機BESS進口證書。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 61427-2:2024 (Secondary cells and batteries for renewable energy storage — on-grid applications, adopted by BSMD via GCC / GSO)
IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications)
IEC 62933-2-1 (Electrical energy storage systems — safety requirements for grid-integrated energy storage systems)
IEC 62933-5-2 (Electrical energy storage systems — safety requirements)

summary.en: China BESS files commonly include GB 44240-2024 (mandatory safety standard for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric-energy-storage, effective 2024) and GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for electrochemical energy storage systems). These documents may support technical due diligence but do not by themselves satisfy IEC 62619:2022 certification requests or project-level BESS acceptance in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024（电化学储能用锂离子电芯和电池强制安全标准，2024年生效）和GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能系统用锂离子电池组）。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但本身不能满足IEC 62619:2022认证要求或巴林项目层面的BESS验收。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池強制安全標準，2024年生效）和GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能系統用鋰離子電池組）。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但本身不能滿足IEC 62619:2022認證要求或巴林項目層面的BESS驗收。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 62619:2022 accredited-lab test reports for lithium cells and battery packs. For utility or commercial BESS projects, prepare IEC 62933 system-level evidence. Confirm with BSMD or an in-country consultant whether GSO IEC 61427-2:2024 applies to the specific product configuration and whether a conformity route is required before import.
gap.zh: 取得锂电芯和电池包IEC 62619:2022认可实验室测试报告。对于公用事业或商业BESS项目，准备IEC 62933系统层面证据。与BSMD或当地顾问确认GSO IEC 61427-2:2024是否适用于特定产品配置，以及进口前是否需要合规路径。
gap.zht: 取得鋰電芯和電池包IEC 62619:2022認可實驗室測試報告。對於公用事業或商業BESS項目，準備IEC 62933系統層面證據。與BSMD或當地顧問確認GSO IEC 61427-2:2024是否適用於特定產品配置，以及進口前是否需要合規路徑。

mandatory_status.target: GSO IEC 61427-2:2024 adopted by Bahrain/GCC for on-grid renewable energy storage batteries; mandatory scope depends on product classification; IEC 62619:2022 evidence expected by project stakeholders
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended unless incorporated by regulation, project, or contract

source.publisher: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) / GSO, Ministry of Industry and Commerce

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain has adopted GSO IEC 61427-2:2024 for on-grid renewable energy storage batteries. Obtain IEC 62619:2022 accredited-lab reports for lithium cells and battery packs. Confirm the exact conformity route with BSMD before import. China GB reports support due diligence but are not a substitute for IEC-numbered certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林已采用GSO IEC 61427-2:2024用于并网可再生能源储能电池。取得锂电芯和电池包IEC 62619:2022认可实验室报告。进口前与BSMD确认具体合规路径。中国GB报告可支持尽调，但不能替代IEC编号认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林已採用GSO IEC 61427-2:2024用於併網可再生能源儲能電池。取得鋰電芯和電池包IEC 62619:2022認可實驗室報告。進口前與BSMD確認具體合規路徑。中國GB報告可支持盡調，但不能替代IEC編號認證。
